pageSubtitle: Choose a time and send a private request.
manualSuccessBody: You will get a confirmation after this time is reviewed.
autoConfirmSuccessBody: A calendar invite is on the way.
expiredSlotMessage: This time is no longer available. Choose another time.
inboxUnavailableMessage: Requests are not available right now. Try again later.
encryptionUnavailableMessage: This browser cannot encrypt the request. Try another browser.
